channel.name: Bahmni Encounter to HIE
channel.description: Increment 2.4 (issue #13), per Gate C (ADR 0005) and ADR 0003. Polls Bahmni's OpenMRS FHIR2 R4 Encounter endpoint and conditionally upserts each encounter into the HAPI hub keyed on Encounter.identifier under https://lab.example/identifiers/bahmni-central/encounter (value = the Bahmni encounter/visit UUID, i.e. source-system provenance). The subject is resolved by identifier search against HAPI (never a hardcoded id): Bahmni subject UUID -> Bahmni MRN -> HAPI Patient?identifier lookup. Fully validated in 2.5.
channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
